sync_log.summary: 21-commit incremental sync — local k3d stack CLI (eve local up/down/status/health/reset/logs), ingress aliases (vanity URLs, admin reclaim), access bind --project required, staging kubeconfig safety, OpenAPI spec regen
CLI sync: +26 source docs/CLI changes (ollama wake command, local stack registry override, CLI local-stack ownership checks); distilled into eve-work/eve-read-eve-docs references
13-commit incremental sync — ECR migration updates, managed inference catalog/model workflow updates, and CLI managed inference + registry updates

45-commit incremental sync — auth token sync refactor (Claude token type detection, Codex write-back), SSH key invite, RBAC multi-org fixes, harness git policy fixes, shared package extraction, private-skills glob exclusion

32-commit incremental sync — object store + org filesystem (presigned URLs, share tokens, public paths, app object stores), Codex harness fixes (auth, sandbox, streaming), CLI improvements (admin users, --version, first-experience auth, log normalization), worker image tooling (gh, jq)
